|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | When Israel came out of Egypt, the children of Jacob from a people whose language was strange to them; | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Judah became his holy place, and Israel his kingdom. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | The sea saw it, and went in flight; Jordan was turned back. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | The mountains were jumping like goats, and the little hills like lambs. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | What was wrong with you, O sea, that you went in flight? O Jordan, that you were turned back? | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | You mountains, why were you jumping like goats, and you little hills like lambs? | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Be troubled, O earth, before the Lord, before the God of Jacob; | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Who made the rock into a water-spring, and the hard stone into a fountain. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
